\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5088 introduces Vector Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$(∂t)(∇ \times)(A)(∇^2 − c^{−2} ∂^2t) \int \rho \, dV = N$$
